name: djungle-plugins
description: Plugin marketplace Djungle — agenti AI, skill operative, integrazioni MCP per clienti FNX / Djungle Bridge / Space.

plugins.name: djungle-agent-os
plugins.description: Connect Claude to the Djungle Agent OS. v4.4.0: user-aware auth — Personal API Key valida su tutti i tuoi tenant, switch fluido in Cowork via /tenant switch (set_active_tenant). v4.3.x: multi-tenant + brand emoji. v4.2.x: Librarian — briefing weekly automatico con alert. v4.1.x: custom agents UI, marketplace, /sota-board dashboard, agent versioning. Self-service portal su agents.djungle.io.
